description: Displays a person's post-nominal letters or academic qualifications as a styled paragraph.

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Post-nominal letters for an academic staff member

props.text: BA (Hons), MA, PhD, FRSA, FHEA, CEng

notes: Appears on staff profile pages to display academic qualifications and post-nominal letters. Text varies across pages — modelled as a required string prop.
